title: 5PK Animal Finger Puppets Set, Educational Finger Puppets Toys for Girls Boys | Monkey, Zebra, Elephant, Giraffe, Lion |6cm BPA-free PVC Puppets | Bath Toys Easter Xmas Gift for Kids
features: 🧒EDUCATIONAL TOYS: These finger puppets improve their animal recognition and bring more fun and imagination. These fun toys promote developmental play and encourage learning. They can improve overall cognitive skills for kids. Finger puppets, training oral communication skills and logical thinking skills. This toy helps improve hand-eye coordination and encourages imaginative play. The size makes these toys easy to hold and allows for hours of fun in and out of the bath.

🐘PARENT & CHILD TIME: You can pretend to be different animals during bath time and before going to bed, and have fun interactions with your kids to improve their communication skills and logical reasoning skills. This is a fun parent-child interactive teaching educational toy. Perfectly playful companion for your child’s bath time. Waterproof and dries quickly. These cute and fun animals can quickly grab a child's interest, awaken their imagination and keep them entertained for hours.

🦒UNIQUE HOLIDAY GIFTS: These toys make excellent stocking stuffers, party favors, or gifts for friends and family during the Easter, Christmas season. They are perfect presents for as party favors, birthday cake toppers, festival gift, stocking stuffers, basket filler, Halloween décor, thanksgiving, educational purpose, new year, Easter eggs stuffing, Children's Day gift and kids party. Widely used by teachers and parents in schools, daycare, homes, kindergartens, puppet theater.

✅ PACKAGE INCLUDES: Customer will get: Set of 5 adorable animal finger puppets (Includes: 1x Monkey, 1x Zebra, 1x Elephant, 1x Giraffe, 1x Lion). Funny Easter basket stuffers and eggs filling. Good addition and decoration for animal themed parties. Perfectly sized for an egg hunt surprise (Eggs not included). Perfect size for kids & adult Easy to put on. Surprise them on Christmas with these animal finger puppets. Perfect Gifts for kids and adult of indoor and outdoor games.

📏DIEMENSSIONS & 🏗️MATERIAL: Bathtime Puppets toy set Made of BPA-Free PVC safe and durable materials for long-lasting. Suitable for all types of fingers playing. Very comfortable for your kids to touch with their cute little fingers. Each Kids Puppet size is Height: 6cm, Width: 5.7, Bottom Dia: 3cm. Not easy to deform and has no peculiar smell. All fingers are comfortable and firmly in the grip holes. Can be used multiple times, suitable for playing in the hand.
